CIPHER.322.cipherString: Let us often think of our own infirmities, and we shall become indulgent toward those of others.
CIPHER.322.question: A quote by Francois Fenelon has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher for you to decode. What does it say?
CIPHER.322.author: Francois Fenelon

CIPHER.323.cipherString: Finding is reserved for those that search.
CIPHER.323.question: A message by Jim Rohn encrypted with the Baconian cipher has been received. You are told that the deciphered text starts with FIND. What does it say?
CIPHER.323.author: Jim Rohn

CIPHER.324.cipherString: Be ever on your guard what you say of any man, and to whom.
CIPHER.324.question: Horace offers us some advice that has been encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of RUMORS and polybius key of NONDISPARAGING. What does it say?
CIPHER.324.author: Horace

CIPHER.325.cipherString: We prove worthy of the privileges that we have not by paying anything back, but by paying it forward.
CIPHER.325.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Aristocrat encoded quote by Cory Booker. What does it say?
CIPHER.325.author: Cory Booker

CIPHER.326.cipherString: Friends should be very delicate and careful in administering pity as medicine, when enemies use the same article as poison.
CIPHER.326.question: John Frederick Boyes has been heard to give some cautionary advice that has been encoded using the Patristocrat cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher's third and fourth words are BE VERY. What does it say?
CIPHER.326.author: John Frederick Boyes

CIPHER.327.cipherString: No school without spectacular eccentrics and crazy hearts is worth attending.
CIPHER.327.question: Saul Bellow was often heard to say the following phrase which has been encoded as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of ACADEMICS. What does it say?
CIPHER.327.author: Saul Bellow

CIPHER.350.cipherString: Books, she has found, are a way to live a thousand lives--or to find strength in a very long one.
CIPHER.350.question: The following quote from the book The Invisible Life of Addie LaRue has been encoded with the Complete Columnar cipher. The quote has THOUSAND somewhere in it. What does it say?

CIPHER.328.cipherString: Three minutes thought would suffice to find this out;but thought is irksome and three minutes is a long time.
CIPHER.328.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by A. E. Housman encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.328.author: A. E. Housman

CIPHER.329.cipherString: It has nothing to do with dinosaurs. Good taste doesn't go out of style.
CIPHER.329.question: Linus Torvalds offers an observation that has been encoded as a Porta using a keyword of LINUX. What does it say?
CIPHER.329.author: Linus Torvalds

CIPHER.330.cipherString: I walk beyond town, many of these nights, to stand under the high autumnal stars, look upward and wonder.
CIPHER.330.question: You came across the following poetic observation written on a wall in a cave. You are told that it's a quote by Poul Anderson encoded as an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.330.author: Poul Anderson

CIPHER.333.cipherString: Some fumes which are not poisonous would be a welcome change.
CIPHER.333.question: Sherlock Holmes offers an opinion that has been encoded as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has CHAN in it corresponding to the encoded text V H A B N C, meaning A = ●●●; B = ●×●; C = ●×–; H = –●×; N = –×–; V = ×–●. What does it say?
CIPHER.333.author: Sherlock Holmes

CIPHER.338.cipherString: Perhaps knowing that you are enough for one person goes a long way.
CIPHER.338.question: From the book My Friends by Fredrik Backman, a quote has been encoded as a Nihilist Substitution cipher with a keyword of BEAUTY and polybius key of MURMUROUSLY. What does it say?
CIPHER.338.author: Fredrik Backman

CIPHER.334.cipherString: Conduction is the flow of heat through an unequally heated body from places of higher to places of lower temperature.
CIPHER.334.question: A quote from the book Theory of Heat has been encoded using the Patristocrat Cipher using a K2 alphabet for you to decode. You are told that the cipher contains is the, corresponding to the ciphertext letters SRMQK. What does it say?
CIPHER.334.author: Theory of Heat

CIPHER.335.cipherString: Business today consists in persuading crowds.
CIPHER.335.question: Solve this quote by T. S. Eliot that has been encoded using the Baconian Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.335.author: T. S. Eliot

CIPHER.332.cipherString: Our liberty depends on the freedom of the press, and that cannot be limited without being lost.
CIPHER.332.question: A famous phrase by Thomas Jefferson has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.332.author: Thomas Jefferson

CIPHER.351.cipherString: But if you only walk in other people's steps, you cannot make your own way. You cannot leave a mark.
CIPHER.351.question: Decrypt the following cipher text from The Invisible Life of Addie LaRue that has been encoded using the Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has PEOPLE'S somewhere in it. What does it say?

CIPHER.339.cipherString: Children have two worlds, the one they have been given and the one they can dream about.
CIPHER.339.question: In his book My Friends, Fredrik Backman offers an observation that has been encoded as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of EXPRESSIBILITY. What does it say?
CIPHER.339.author: Fredrik Backman

CIPHER.340.question: Solve this quote that has been encoded using the Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 3719 524 438567 decode to?

CIPHER.342.cipherString: If you shut up truth, and bury it underground, it will but grow.
CIPHER.342.question: The following odd symbols were found when a tomb was opened, but you recognized it as the handiwork of a prankster who scratched a quote by Emile Zola on the wall using a Baconian alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.342.author: Emile Zola

CIPHER.343.cipherString: If you could cross a lion and a monkey, that's what I'd be, because monkeys are funny and lions are strong.
CIPHER.343.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Aristocrat encoded quote by Marlon Wayans about a hypothetical situation using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.343.author: Marlon Wayans

CIPHER.344.cipherString: She said no, and learned how much the word was worth.
CIPHER.344.question: Decrypt the following cipher text from V. E. Schwab's The Invisible Life of Addie LaRue that has been encoded using the Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has NO, AND in it corresponding to the encoded text F H Y K N S, meaning F = –●×; H = –––; K = –×–; N = ●×–; S = ●●×; Y = ××●. What does it say?
CIPHER.344.author: V. E. Schwab

CIPHER.345.cipherString: Fue un libro muy mágico y fascinante. Cada parte que leías era increíble y te daba ganas de seguir leyendo.
CIPHER.345.question: This is a snippet of an Amazon book review for La Caseta Mágica, which is the Spanish language edition of the classic novel The Phantom Tollbooth. It has been edited only to add punctuation, and then encoded as a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet for you to decode. What does it say?

CIPHER.341.cipherString: Be whatever you want to in life, as long as you don't become a critic. Not of other people and not of yourself.
CIPHER.341.question: The following quote by Fredrik Backman needs to be decoded with the Aristocrat cipher using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.341.author: Fredrik Backman

CIPHER.346.question: A phrase has been encoded using the Hill Cipher with a keyword of FISH. What does it say?

CIPHER.348.cipherString: I am not some genie, bound to your whim. Nor am I some petty forest spirit, content with granting favors for mortal trinkets.
CIPHER.348.question: A snippet of V. E. Schwab's book The Invisible Life of Addie LaRue has been encoded with the Aristocrat Cipher using a K3 alphabet for you to decode. What was the K3 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.348.author: V. E. Schwab

CIPHER.349.question: Decrypt the following cipher text that has been encoded using the Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 9 65108 3924 decode to?

CIPHER.347.cipherString: Un buen libro que hará disfrutar a los lectores con una aventura repleta de enseñanzas para los más jóvenes.
CIPHER.347.question: This one is from an Amazon book review of Una arruga en el tiempo, which is the Spanish language edition of the children's novel A Wrinkle in Time. It's been encoded as a K2 Aristocrat with an English keyword. What does it say?

CIPHER.336.cipherString: All growth is a leap in the dark, a spontaneous unpremeditated act without benefit of experience.
CIPHER.336.question: Henry Miller has been heard to say the following phrase that has been encoded using the Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.336.author: Henry Miller
